learningObjectives: Recognise and use numbers 1–20 in familiar contexts.
Ask and answer how old and how many questions.
Name days of the week and use today correctly.
Tell time using o'clock at Starters level.
Talk about birthdays with numbers and days.
grammarFocus: Question words: how many, how old

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Twenty students are in the class.

grammarReference.explanation: Use numbers to count people, things and to say age. Numbers one to twenty are core at Starters level.
commonMistakes: I have seven year (×) → I am seven years old (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Question words: how many, how old
grammarReference.explanation: Use how many to ask about quantity (countable things). Use how old to ask about age.
examples: How old are you? — I am eight.
commonMistakes: How many years you? (×) → How old are you? (✓)
How old books? (×) → How many books? (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Recognise days of the week and months. Use today for the current day. Birthday often includes a day or month.
commonMistakes: Today is Monday? (statement) → Today is Monday. (✓)
on Tuesday birthday (×) → My birthday is on Tuesday. (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Numbers and Days
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve number and time words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Number Word Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word or number.

questions.explanation: Monday and Tuesday are days of the week. Numbers count things; birthday is one special day.

choices.distractorNote: One event, not a list of weekdays

questions.questionText: You eat cake and get presents on your _____.
questions.explanation: Birthday is the day you were born; people celebrate with cake and gifts.

choices.distractorNote: Today means this day, not the celebration

questions.explanation: O'clock comes after a number to tell the hour: eight o'clock.
Two plus one equals three. Learners sometimes confuse three and ten because both start with t.

choices.distractorNote: One of the numbers in the sum, not the answer

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the number and time words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Each word has one clear meaning. Ten and twenty are often confused by young learners.

exercises.title: Check: Numbers and Days Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: O'clock đi sau số để chỉ giờ.

choices.distractorNote: Sự kiện, không phải thời gian

questions.questionText: Today is _____. It is not Monday.
questions.explanation: Tuesday là thứ Ba — ngày trong tuần.

questions.questionText: Complete with number or day words.
questions.explanation: one/two cho số lượng; Monday cho ngày.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers and Days Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: O'clock đi sau số để chỉ giờ.

choices.distractorNote: Sự kiện, không phải thời gian

questions.questionText: Today is _____. It is not Monday.
questions.explanation: Tuesday là thứ Ba — ngày trong tuần.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Counting to Twenty
lessons.learningObjective: Use numbers ten to twenty in simple sentences.

questions.explanation: 10+10=20. Twenty là hai mươi.

questions.questionText: There are _____ students in the photo.
questions.explanation: Ten (mười) chỉ số lượng.
Thứ tự số: ... eight, nine, ten.
Mười, hai mươi — số lượng lớn hơn ở Starters.
Twenty (20) lớn nhất trong bộ từ.

questions.questionText: I see _____ birds in the tree.
questions.explanation: Ten đếm chim.
Điền ten hoặc twenty phù hợp ngữ cảnh.

content.template: I am [0] years old. My class has [1] children.

questions.explanation: Twenty (20) lớn nhất trong bộ từ.

questions.questionText: I see _____ birds in the tree.
questions.explanation: Ten đếm chim.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Time and Days
lessons.learningObjective: Use today, o'clock and days of the week in context.

questions.questionText: _____ is Monday. We go to school.
questions.explanation: Today (hôm nay) với ngày hiện tại.
O'clock sau số chỉ giờ.
Tuesday là ngày trong tuần.
Ghép từ thời gian với nghĩa.

pairs.right: first school day in the text

questions.explanation: O'clock đi với số giờ.
Today — hôm nay không phải sinh nhật.
School starts at + giờ + o'clock.
O'clock đi với số giờ.
Today — hôm nay không phải sinh nhật.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: How Many? How Old?
lessons.learningObjective: Use how many and how old to ask about quantity and age with numbers 1–20.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose How Many or How Old

questions.explanation: How old asks about age. The answer I am nine confirms this.

choices.distractorNote: Asks about count of things, not age

questions.questionText: _____ cats do you have? — I have two cats.
questions.explanation: How many asks about the number of countable nouns (cats).
Ten is a common Starters age number. Use a number before years old.

questions.questionText: There are _____ books on the desk.
questions.explanation: Three is the number for counting books. Twenty is too many for a small desk picture at Starters.

choices.distractorNote: Plausible but unlikely in simple Starters context

exercises.title: Practice: Complete with Numbers
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct numbers.

questions.questionText: Complete: I am [0] years old. | I have [1] brothers. | School is at [2] o'clock.
questions.explanation: Seven for age, two brothers (small family), eight o'clock for school time — all typical Starters contexts.

content.template: I am [0] years old. I have [1] brothers. School is at [2] o'clock.

exercises.title: Check: How Many / How Old Quiz

questions.questionText: _____ books are on the desk? — Three.
questions.explanation: How many hỏi số lượng danh từ đếm được.

questions.questionText: _____ is your sister? — She is six.
questions.explanation: How old hỏi tuổi — trả lời She is six.
How old + tuổi; How many + số lượng.

content.template: [0] are you? I am nine. [1] cats do you have? Two.

exercises.title: Review: How Many / How Old Quiz

questions.questionText: _____ books are on the desk? — Three.
questions.explanation: How many hỏi số lượng danh từ đếm được.

questions.questionText: _____ is your sister? — She is six.
questions.explanation: How old hỏi tuổi — trả lời She is six.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Numbers in Sentences
lessons.learningObjective: Use numbers 1–20 correctly in answers about age and quantity.

exercises.title: Learn: Numbers with am and are

questions.explanation: I am + tuổi.
They are + tuổi số nhiều.
Điền số cho tuổi và số lượng.
Three pens → are.
Six là số tuổi.
How many + danh từ số nhiều + do you have?
Three pens → are.
Six là số tuổi.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Days Recognition
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise days of the week in questions and answers.

questions.explanation: What day is it today? — hỏi thứ mấy.
On + ngày trong tuần.
Monday/Tuesday trong câu.

questions.questionText: School is closed on Sunday. Monday is the next _____.
questions.explanation: Monday là ngày (day).
Tuesday — ngày trong tuần.

questions.questionText: School is closed on Sunday. Monday is the next _____.
questions.explanation: Monday là ngày (day).

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Tom's Birthday
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text with numbers and days and answer questions about main idea, details and vocabulary.

exercises.title: Learn: Read: Tom's Birthday
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Tom's Birthday
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Tom. I am seven years old. My birthday is on Monday.

Today is Tuesday. I am at school. I have two friends. Their names are Ben and Kim. Ben is ten. Kim is five.

We go home at four o'clock. On Monday I had five candles on my cake. I was very happy!

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Tom talks about his age, birthday on Monday, friends' ages, and time — all about numbers and days.

choices.text: Tom tells us about his birthday, friends and times.
Tom talks about sports at school.
choices.distractorNote: School is mentioned but not sports

questions.explanation: The text says: I am seven years old.

questions.questionText: Why does Tom say 'Today is Tuesday'?
questions.explanation: His birthday was Monday (yesterday); today he is at school on Tuesday.

choices.text: His birthday was yesterday; now it is the next day.
He does not know the day.

questions.questionText: In 'We go home at four o'clock', what does o'clock mean?
questions.explanation: O'clock tells the hour — they go home at four on the clock.

choices.text: It tells the time on the clock.
It is a day of the week.

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Tom tells his age and birthday day (2) Tom describes today and his friends at school (3) Tom talks about going home and his birthday cake
questions.explanation: Văn bản đi theo thứ tự: tuổi và sinh nhật → hôm nay ở trường với bạn → giờ về nhà và bánh sinh nhật.

choices.distractorNote: Tuổi và sinh nhật xuất hiện trước phần hôm nay ở trường

passage.title: Tom's Birthday
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Tom. I am seven years old.

My birthday is on Tuesday. Today is Monday. I am very happy!

I have ten friends at my party. We eat cake. My mother says: "Happy birthday, Tom!"

School starts at eight o'clock. I love my birthday!

questions.questionText: How many friends at Tom's party?
questions.explanation: I have ten friends at my party.
My birthday is on Tuesday.

passage.title: Tom's Birthday
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Tom. I am seven years old.

My birthday is on Tuesday. Today is Monday. I am very happy!

I have ten friends at my party. We eat cake. My mother says: "Happy birthday, Tom!"

School starts at eight o'clock. I love my birthday!

questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: I am seven years old.
My birthday is on Tuesday.

questions.questionText: What time does school start for Tom?
questions.explanation: School starts at eight o'clock.

passage.title: Tom's Birthday
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Tom. I am seven years old.

My birthday is on Tuesday. Today is Monday. I am very happy!

I have ten friends at my party. We eat cake. My mother says: "Happy birthday, Tom!"

School starts at eight o'clock. I love my birthday!

questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: I am seven years old.
My birthday is on Tuesday.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Our Class Clock
lessons.learningObjective: Read for time, quantity and age in a classroom text.

passage.title: Our Class Clock
passage.text:
This is our classroom. Look at the clock on the wall.

It is three o'clock. We have twenty books on the desk.

How many pens? One, two, three — three pens.

How old is our teacher? She is thirty. We say: "Good afternoon!"

questions.questionText: What time is it on the clock?
questions.explanation: It is three o'clock.
One, two, three — three pens.

passage.title: Our Class Clock
passage.text:
This is our classroom. Look at the clock on the wall.

It is three o'clock. We have twenty books on the desk.

How many pens? One, two, three — three pens.

How old is our teacher? She is thirty. We say: "Good afternoon!"

questions.questionText: How many books are on the desk?
questions.explanation: We have twenty books.
She is thirty.

passage.title: Our Class Clock
passage.text:

It is three o'clock. We have twenty books on the desk.

How old is our teacher? She is thirty. We say: "Good afternoon!"

questions.explanation: Look at the clock on the wall.
Bài mô tả lớp học, đồng hồ, số lượng.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Days at School
lessons.learningObjective: Understand days of the week and ages in a short school text.

passage.title: Days at School
passage.text:
We go to school on Monday and Tuesday. On Wednesday we play in the park.

Today is Thursday. I am eight. My friend Lin is seven.

How many days? One, two, three, four days this week.

School finishes at four o'clock. We are tired and happy!

questions.questionText: Which days do they go to school?
questions.explanation: We go to school on Monday and Tuesday.
I am eight.

passage.title: Days at School
passage.text:
We go to school on Monday and Tuesday. On Wednesday we play in the park.

Today is Thursday. I am eight. My friend Lin is seven.

How many days? One, two, three, four days this week.

School finishes at four o'clock. We are tired and happy!

questions.explanation: My friend Lin is seven.
School finishes at four o'clock.

passage.title: Days at School
passage.text:
We go to school on Monday and Tuesday. On Wednesday we play in the park.

Today is Thursday. I am eight. My friend Lin is seven.

How many days? One, two, three, four days this week.

School finishes at four o'clock. We are tired and happy!

questions.questionText: What do they do on Wednesday?
questions.explanation: On Wednesday we play in the park.
Điền từ trong bài đọc.

content.template: Today is [0]. School finishes at [1] o'clock.

passage.title: Days at School
passage.text:
We go to school on Monday and Tuesday. On Wednesday we play in the park.

Today is Thursday. I am eight. My friend Lin is seven.

How many days? One, two, three, four days this week.

School finishes at four o'clock. We are tired and happy!

questions.questionText: What do they do on Wednesday?
questions.explanation: On Wednesday we play in the park.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Ages at School
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to short conversations and identify ages, numbers and times.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen: In the Classroom
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: In the Classroom

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Lily. How old are you?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: How many pencils do you have?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Good. What day is it today?

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 40 seconds.

questions.explanation: Lily says: I am eight years old.

questions.questionText: How many pencils does Lily have?
questions.explanation: Lily says: I have three pencils.
Lily says: Today is Tuesday.

choices.distractorNote: Word from question, not the day name

questions.explanation: Lily says: At three o'clock.

choices.distractorNote: Common school start time, not finish

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Mai. How old are you?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: And how old is your brother?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: How many books do you have?

questions.explanation: He is ten.

questions.questionText: Who asks How old are you?
questions.explanation: Teacher: How old are you?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Mai. How old are you?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: And how old is your brother?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: How many books do you have?

questions.explanation: Mai nói: I am seven.

questions.questionText: How many books does Mai have?
questions.explanation: I have three books.
Ghép tuổi và số lượng từ hội thoại.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Mai. How old are you?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: And how old is your brother?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: How many books do you have?

questions.explanation: Mai nói: I am seven.

questions.questionText: How many books does Mai have?
questions.explanation: I have three books.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: What Day Is It?
lessons.learningObjective: Understand questions about days and time in dialogues.

questions.explanation: Today is Monday.
My birthday is on Tuesday.
It is two o'clock.
Tom asks: What day is it today?
Ghép câu hỏi và câu trả lời.
Tom asks: What day is it today?

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Counting at Home
lessons.learningObjective: Extract ages and numbers from a home dialogue.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Good! How old are you now?

questions.explanation: Three apples.
I am six today! Happy birthday!

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Good! How old are you now?

questions.explanation: Mother: Happy birthday!

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Good! How old are you now?

questions.explanation: How many apples are there?
I am six today.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Good! How old are you now?

questions.explanation: How many apples are there?

questions.explanation: I am + số + years old.
It is + giờ + o'clock.
Khung câu cho tuổi và ngày.

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Talk About Age and Time
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about age, numbers, days and time with words and short phrases.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: How old are you? You say:
questions.explanation: I am + tuổi.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: How many books? You say:
questions.explanation: I have + số + danh từ.

questions.questionText: You want someone's age. You ask:
questions.explanation: How old are you? — chuẩn.
